## Other Outlaw Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Barghesi Thrall (Cost: 2 Glory)

A Drukhari Warband can also take this Mercenary. A Necromunda Gang Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Barghesi Thrall | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Barghesi Thrall is equipped with its Bite. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bite.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Enthralled.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Barghesi Thrall forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.  
* **Hyper-Aggression.** The Barghesi Thrall has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Maul.** The Barghesi Thrallis can take the Fight action an additional time during its activation, but only to attack a Down target.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, FIRETEAM

#### 0-1 Barghesi Raider (Cost: 5 Glory)

A Drukhari Warband can also take this Mercenary. A Necromunda Gang Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Barghesi Raider | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+2 | \-1 | 40-50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Barghesi Raider is equipped with Standard Armour, a Harpoon Launcher, a Two-Handed Hammer, and a Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Harpoon Launcher.** 18”, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, RISKY. If the wielder hits a target with this weapon that is not LARGE, the model hit is moved in a straight line D6” directly towards the wielder.  
* **Two-Handed Hammer.** Melee, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, HEAVY  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Hyper-Aggression.** The Barghesi Raider has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, LARGE, STRONG, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Beastman Bounty Hunter (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Beastman Bounty Hunter | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Beastman Bounty Hunter is equipped with Standard Armour, a Plasma Pistol, Frag Grenades, and a Chain Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Plasma Pistol.** 12”  
  * Normal Shot: ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
  * Overload: 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, RISKY, roll on the injury table on a miss  
* **Frag Grenades.** 8”, ASSAULT, BLAST 2”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE LONG RANGE, SHRAPNEL  
* **Chain Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, MAIN HAND ONLY

**Abilities**

* **Bullrush.** When the Beastman Bounty Hunter successfully Charges one or more enemies, give one of those enemies a BLOOD MARKER.

**Keywords**  
BEASTMEN, FEAR

#### 0-1 Freebooter (Cost: 3 Glory)

A Pirate Crew Warband cannot take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Freebooter | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+2 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Freebooter is equipped with ‘Eavy Armour, a Kustom Shoota, a Chain Choppa, and a Hook. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Kustom Shoota.** 18”, AUTOMATIC 3, \-1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, RISKY  
* **Chain Choppa.** Melee, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Hook.** Melee

**Keywords**  
ORK, STRONG

#### 0-1 Kroot Skinner (Cost: 3 Glory)

A Pirate Crew Warband cannot take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Kroot Skinner | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Kroot Skinner is equipped with a Dvorgite Skinner, a Blade, a Short Blade, and Tri-Blades. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Dvorgite Skinner.** 8”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-1 INJURY DICE, GAS  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL  
* **Short Blade.** Melee  
* **Tri-Blades.** 12”, IGNORE LONG RANGE, ASSAULT

**Abilities**

* **Long Stride.** The Kroot Skinner has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
KROOT, STEALTH

#### 0-1 Piscean Ambusher (Cost: 3 Glory)

A Pirate Crew Warband cannot take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Piscean Ambusher | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Piscean Ambusher is equipped with Standard Armour, a Piscean Rifle, and a Piscean Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Piscean Rifle.** 24”, VICIOUS 11, ASSAULT, CRITICAL  
* **Piscean Blade.** Melee, CLEAVE 2

**Abilities**

* **Dark Depths.** The Piscean Ambusher ignores all penalties to its attack Success Rolls besides Cover and Long Range, as well as penalties or limits to the range of its ranged weapons.

**Keywords**  
DEEP STRIKE, SKIRMISHER

#### 0-1 Zoat Archivist (Cost: 6 Glory)

Can be taken by Xenos (Slanni) Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Zoat Archivist | 5”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Zoat Archivist is equipped with armoured scales, included in its statistics above, as well as an Atomic Disassembler, an Eradicator Glove, and a Rebreather. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Atomic Disassembler.** 18”, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE ARMOUR, ASSAULT  
* **Eradicator Glove.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR  
* **Rebreather.** The model has NEGATE GAS.

**Abilities**

* **Disruptive Influence (PSYCHIC).** Enemy models within 6” of the Zoat Archivist have \-1 to Hit with all attacks.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, LARGE, TOUGH
